title: Organigram (OGI) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: OrganiGram Q3 2023 Earnings Call. Earnings Announcement and Timing: OGI reported earnings on July 13, 2023 after the market close, with a conference call held for investors at 8:00 AM eastern on July 14, 2023. Pre-Earnings Expectations: Prior to the earnings announcement, the company expected Q3 Fiscal 2023 net revenue to be higher than Q3 2022 and Q2 2023, largely due to growth from innovation, expanded product lines in multiple segments, greater capacity at the Moncton Campus, increased throughput at the Winnipeg facility, contributions from the Lac-Supérieur facility, and anticipated continued international shipments. Actual Results: However, the company reported a 14% decrease in net revenue compared to the prior period. Market Position: Despite the revenue decline, the company regained the #3 position in the Canadian market and achieved strong sales in milled flower, concentrates, and gummies. International Expansion: Additionally, international sales for the first nine months of fiscal 2023 exceeded the prior year by 94%. Stock Performance: OGI shares declined -19.6% the day following the earnings announcement.
